## From 3 to 12 locations in 6 months

FoodRepublic partnered with HitPay to unify their payment infrastructure across Singapore.

**$2.5M** Monthly volume
**150%** Growth rate
**12** Active locations

---

> "HitPay's POS system made it possible to scale without adding complexity." — Tan Wei Ming, COO, FoodRepublic

- **Unified dashboard** — one view across all locations
- **Multi-method acceptance** — cards, QR, e-wallets
- **Real-time reporting** — instant visibility into performance
